characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main group of the series, Ansi,Olly and Saraline are dedicated to solving the mysteries of The Wayne and protecting its residents. Later they are joined by their friends to help them in the mission of protecting The Wayne. Badass Crew: They turn into thiswhen they fight the vampire army of Glamsterdam. The Chosen Many: They were chosen to protect The Wayneand free the city of Glamsterdam. Beauty, Brains, and Brawn:Katherine-Alice and Dennis are the beauty.Ansi, Saraline, Leif and Wendell are the brains.Olly and Goodness are the brawn. Katherine-Alice and Dennis are the beauty.

characters.name: Team Timbers/The Gyre
characters.description: The main group of the series, Ansi,Olly and Saraline are dedicated to solving the mysteries of The Wayne and protecting its residents. Later they are joined by their friends to help them in the mission of protecting The Wayne. Badass Crew: They turn into thiswhen they fight the vampire army of Glamsterdam. The Chosen Many: They were chosen to protect The Wayneand free the city of Glamsterdam. Beauty, Brains, and Brawn:Katherine-Alice and Dennis are the beauty.Ansi, Saraline, Leif and Wendell are the brains.Olly and Goodness are the brawn. Katherine-Alice and Dennis are the beauty.

characters.name: Ansi Molina
characters.description: The main protagonist of the series, a shy and bookish new resident of The Wayne. Seeks to understand the strange phenomena and creatures within it, together with his closest friends, the Timbers siblings. Ambiguously Brown: His dark skin and his surnames suggest he's Latino. His first name suggests he's Indian as well. Big Ol' Eyebrows: His eyebrows are noticeably thicker and existent when compared to the Timbers'. Blue Is Heroic: Has blue clothes and is the protagonist. Brainy Brunette: He's presumably a very experienced student, as he claims that his class is "very low level".

characters.name: Olly Timbers
characters.description: The most easygoing of the core trio, who is constantly prone to cracking jokes and goofing around. Is Ansi's best friend and Saraline's older brother, and has lived in The Wayne for all his life. Acrofatic: Despite being somewhat fat he can really move around with his Grapvine and fights with surprising agility. Big Eater: One of his interests is eating and a lot. Book Dumb: "What? I watch public television sometimes." Catchphrase: "Bunsy!"

characters.name: Saraline Timbers
characters.description: The brains of Team Timbers, an incredibly intelligent and determined girl and Olly's younger sister, who has lived in The Wayne for all her life. Badass Longcoat: It's not exactly a trenchcoat but her coat is big enough to leave only a small portion of her pants visible. Boots of Toughness: Up to her knees. Cannot Tell a Joke: Enters the Wayne talent show in "Leave the Funny, Find the Bunny" performing an extremely science-themed brand of stand-up comedy that nobody enjoys; even Wendell remarks that she was "born without a funny bone". She later uses this trait to an advantage in order to foil theMonster of the Week's plan to hypnotize the audience and turn them into rabbits, as the audience are too preoccupied with heckling her to pay attention to the hypnosis. Crazy-Prepared: She is always equipped with all sorts of inventions and gadgets made by her parents.

characters.name: Leif Bornewell III
characters.description: An awkward and pompous but ultimately well-meaning kid, and the first person outside of the core trio to tag along on Team Timbers' adventures. Butt-Monkey: Has found himself injured on several occasions while tagging along on adventures. In "8:08:08", his request to be untied is met with total indifference from Team Timbers. Characterization Marches On: In the pilot he wasn't aButt-Monkey, but in the series he doesn't have the others respect and has bad luck even after joining the team and the characters weren't fond of him because of his smug behavior, but in the series he annoys the team because he tries to be the team's"Asset"and messes up while trying to be cool. Demoted to Extra: He had a somewhat important role in the pilot web series pilot, had a more secondary role in the first season of the series, and he has an even smaller role in the second season, barely having any lines. Friendless Background: Has trouble making friends.

characters.name: Wendell Wasserman
characters.description: The son of vampire hunters, who is determined to capture a vampire himself. Alliterative Name: His full name is Wendell William Wasserman. Cowardly Lion: He wimps out when he is in danger or outmatched but he is willing to help his friends and fight. Deadpan Snarker: He usually criticizes and complains in a sarcastic tone.Ansi:"I've been over schedules since the age of four so I'm really good at time."Wendell:"Well thank you so much...FOR WASTING IT WITH THAT EXPLANATION." Dork in a Sweater: Not a sweater, but a bathrobe, which comes off just as dorky.

characters.name: Goodness Rhone
characters.description: An aspiring ninja, and the granddaughter of chief librarian Clara Rhone. Action Girl: She is the best fighter in the team in hand to hand combat. Badass Adorable: She is a great ninja and an adorableGenki Girl. Boyish Short Hair: She has a short curly combover. Genki Girl: When not carrying out ninja work, she's actually quite bubbly and talkative.

characters.name: Katherine-Alice
characters.description: A mysterious young mute who can construct, and communicates through, magical origami figures. Action Girl: She's very skilled using her origami figures to fight. Ascended Extra: Her first appearance was to join the team when they were searching for people while everyone else already have appeared before and then she had a couple of important roles later, in the second season she has more appearances becoming more important for the plot andrecovers her voice. Big Beautiful Woman: She is quite plump and has an adorable appearance. Cute Mute: She communicates using origami, and she sometimes makes cute figures like butterflies and bunnies.

characters.name: Dennis O'Bannon
characters.description: An arrogant tennis jock. Arm Cannon: His weapon is a gatling gun-like cannon in his right hand that shoots tennis balls, he mostly used to employ it to bully other kids, but since he joined the team this became his weapon. Broken Ace: Rich, Handsome and great at tennis but longing for friends until he befriends the protagonists. Character Development: In his two first apperances he was a jerk with the protagonists, but when Saraline invites him to join the group when they were fighting aMonster of the Weekhe helps them and over time he begins to consider them as his friends (but he still bullies Olly and Leif from time to time.) Jerkass: Bullies Ansi and Olly at the Gleeco contest in his debut appearance in "Beeping the Binklemobile", and continues to torment Olly in subsequent appearances. Later shows up to Saraline's birthday party in "8:08:08" solely to bully her party guests and wreak havoc, and spends the rest of the episode vowing to ruin her birthday when he is kicked out of the party.Suggested in "8:08:08" that he simply doesn't want to be left out, which could make for a case of aJerk with a Heart of Gold- yet midway through the episode when Saraline offers to let him join their adventure, he mocks them for thinking that they would get a "bully's heart melts and he joins the good guys" ending, although he joins them in the episode's end.

characters.name: Andrei
characters.description: An amnesiac but friendly vampire that lives in the Wayne. Absurd Phobia: He's horrified of spoons, and not because they're made of silver. Accidental Kidnapping: Basically drags Olly along for the ride when he panics and runs, which Ansi thinks was on purpose. The Chosen One:He's the duke and leader of the Glamsterdam vampires, awakened from his long exile. Dangerous Forbidden Technique: Can control rainbow gas, but with dangerous side effects.

characters.name: Julia Wiles
characters.description: Ansi's new friend and budding crush. Fluffy Tamer:Not only is Julia not a norman, she also acts as something of a caregiver to a number of Wayne Phenomena. Hidden Depths:Perfectly capable of seeing Wayne Phenomena, and in fact the caretaker of a secret chamber containing Wayne Phenomena, as Ansi, Olly and Saraline later discover. Also aware of the Glamsterdam operation, and manipulates Ansi's trust by directing him to hide the key to the gates of Glamsterdam in a location for her to later retrieve, and which later falls into the Spy's hands. Mark of the Supernatural: In "Like a Happy, Happy Bird", has her left eye blue and right eye green, a physical side effect fromGo Mad from the Revelationafter witnessing a Wayne Phenomenon.Later revealed in "Keep an Eye on the Nose" to have been a ruse and actually just contact lenses to hide the fact that she can see Wayne Phenomena normally. Twitchy Eye: Julia's right eye halfway into "Like a Happy, Happy Bird" after witnessing Wayne Phenomena.

characters.name: Jonah Bishop
characters.description: A renowned archaeological professor, and Olly's idol. Hero-Worshipper: Olly is this to him, regardless of the fact that Jonah clearly wants nothing to do with him or Team Timbers in general. Mysterious Past: Whatever it is that he did with Garrison Payne and why he knows about Wayne Phenomena are a mystery. What Happened to the Mouse?: After "A pair of Normas" he disappears from the show. He has a couple of cameos later in the season but he comes back in the second seasonwhere is revealed that he is Tony Stanza.

characters.name: Clara Rhone
characters.description: The chief librarian of The Stanza, a secret library located in The Wayne. Cool Old Lady: Quite adept in combat. Mentor Archetype: To Ansi, in "Rise and Shine Sleepyhead". Never Mess with Granny: She's the elderly librarian who just so happens to be a seasoned combatant who fought potential threats to the Wayne and even participated in full-on battles with vampires. Bonus in that she's passed on her skills to her granddaughter. Scary Librarian: When Team Timbers brings Andrei to the Stanza,she reveals that The Wayne was attacked by vampires in the past, so she considers him dangerous and tries to attack him and almost stabs him, when the team escapes with him she forbids them to come back to the Stanza. Things get better, though.

characters.name: Tony Stanza
characters.description: A mysterious knight connected to The Stanza who guides Team Timbers in several adventures.His identity is finally revealed at the beginning of the second season, when it is revealed he is Jonah Bishop. 24-Hour Armor: Never seen without his armor, which always obscures his face. Only Known by Their Nickname: His actual name is unknown, and he is referred to by the nickname given to him by Ansi, Olly and Saraline. Even he's unsure why they call him that. Smoke Out: Appears and disappears randomly to Team Timbers in clouds of smoke to offer help.

characters.name: Albert Molina
characters.description: Ansi's father, a psychiatrist. Ambiguously Absent Parent: Not him but his wife, he lives with Ansi but she doesn't live with them, its mentioned that she lives in the countryside. The Shrink: Works as a psychiatrist, and often keeps notes on people whom he encounters, including the Timbers family in "Hit It, Toofus!". Ansi thinks he tends to over-analyze things.

characters.name: Harvey and Olympia Timbers
characters.description: Olly and Saraline's parents, who are both inventors. Gadgeteer Genius: The Timbers home is full of "Timbers Tech" which is used by Team Timbers in their adventures. Like Father, Like Son: Harvey has exactly the same personality than Olly, being just as childish and easily distracted. Opposites Attract: Harvey is energetic and outgoing, much like Olly, and Olympia is more calm and levelheaded, much like Saraline.Their given professions in the web series fit their personalities too: Harvey makes toys and Olympia works for the military. Their given professions in the web series fit their personalities too: Harvey makes toys and Olympia works for the military.

characters.name: The Arcsine
characters.description: She is the Wayne's guardian spirit and the most powerful being in the building. Ambiguously Brown:In her human form she has a skin tone darker than Ansi's but lighter than Goodness's. Badass Adorable: A powerful being made of energy that takes the form of a young girl. Barrier Maiden: She is the most powerful being that resides in The Wayne, and it's said that if anyone can control her they can control not just hotel but the entire world. Best Friend: She becomes Saraline's best friend in the second season.

characters.name: Calliope
characters.description: The main villains of the series. Gold Fish Poop Gang:Zigg-zagged, in the pilot and the first episodes Team Timbers avoided confronting them and only faced them when necessary, and even when fighting together and sometimes with Leif's help still they ended in trouble only being saved byDeus ex Machina, but after the new members joined the team they gained advantage by outnumbering them and fighting experience, beating the villains in their following confrontations and even with the three protagonists defeating The Spy and Masterson easily. Nebulous Evil Organization: They aim to control the world through the oddities inside The Wayne.

characters.name: Prismal
characters.description: The Spy's boss, he is the leader of Calliope and theBig Badof the second season. He wants to control The Wayne since "whoever controls The Wayne controls The world". Bad Boss: He doesn't care when Ereaser Face is destroyed and treats The Spy and Masterson poorly. Bling of War: The gem in his left hand is one of The Wayne's Gems and activates his weapon to absorb The Arcsine's powers, when he loses the first one he steals the second from Wendell's sister Stacy. Body Horror: His right arm is partially destroyedafter trying to steal the Arcsine's powers in the pastand his body is contained in his armor and part of his face is also in the same state but covered by his mask. Eldritch Abomination: Afterstealing the Arcsine's powers he turns into a monster made out of dark Beam and is capable of mind controling everyone in The Wayne exposed to it.

characters.name: The Spy from Apartment  8 I
characters.description: The first primary antagonist of the series andBig Badof the first season, the Spy from Apartment 8I has a constant watch on Wayne Phenomena and big plans to take over the building. Big Bad: Of the miniseries and the television series. Demoted to Dragon:When Prismal becomes theBig Badin the second season. Lady in a Power Suit: She wears what looks like a black 80's business suit with padded shoulders and a pencil skirt. Only Known by Their Nickname: The only things she's been addressed by are "the Spy from Apartment 8I" as well as "Mrs. Spite" in "Hit It Toofus".In the last episode of the series her real name is revealed to be Yelena Bishop, implying either a (former) marriage or other familial tie to Jonah Bishop.

characters.name: Flowershirt
characters.description: One of the Spy from Apartment 8I's cohorts. Generally acts as the muscle of the group. Bodyguard Crush: In "Hit It, Toofus!", it's strongly implied that he has a crush on the Spy from Apartment 8i. The Brute: As stated above. Dumb Muscle: He's not very bright to say the least. As shown when hetries to inhale a deadly gas. Fluffy the Terrible: The name "Flowershirt" doesn't seem very fitting doesn't it?

characters.name: Masterson
characters.description: The Spy from Apartment 8I's right-hand man. The Comically Serious: Always has a serious demeanor even during funny moments. Butt-Monkey: He gets hurt or humilliated in many of his apperances. Dual Wielding: When fighting in close range he uses two expandable batons. Number Two: For the Spy.
